title: Pam Macaul
compiled_truth: Pam Macaul is an external contact at [Bmc](companies/bmc). Over the corpus period (2000-10-24 to 2001-12-17), Pam Macaul sent 3 and received 25 emails, totalling 28 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tkuyken](people/tkuyken) (3), [Jennifer Lamprecht](people/jennifer-lamprecht-oxy) (3), [Drrichardson](people/drrichardson-cmsenergy) (2), [Susan Hadix](people/susan-hadix-elpaso) (2), [Wetz2](people/wetz2-gateway) (1).
